title: Effects of Polymer-Based Soil Conditioner and Humic Acid on Soil Properties and Cotton Yield in Saline–Sodic Soils
description: SpeakForWater Episode 3: Effects of Polymer-Based Soil Conditioner and Humic Acid on Soil Properties and Cotton Yield in Saline–Sodic Soils. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
